metaTitle: Restaurant Pest Control NYC | DOH Compliant Extermination | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: NYC DOH-compliant restaurant pest control. Prevent violations and closures. Monthly service contracts. Emergency response. Licensed exterminators. Call now.
h1: Restaurant Pest Control in NYC — DOH Compliance and Zero Tolerance
heroParagraph: A single pest sighting during a NYC DOH inspection can result in a public violation posting, a point deduction on your letter grade, and thousands of dollars in fines. A significant infestation can shut your restaurant down. Our restaurant pest control programs provide monthly or bi-monthly scheduled service, full DOH-compliant documentation, 24/7 emergency response, and treatments scheduled around your operating hours — so your business stays open, compliant, and pest-free.
